title: CravenCraft's Better Weapons
description: A simple texture pack to give vanilla weapons a 3D look inspired by Hytale.
body:
![All vanilla swords from wood to netherite.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e78206c8ff293f6c176a1853480b46a251d69c6.png)

I was inspired by Hytale's detailed 3D weapon models. So, I tested out creating some weapon models in a similar style. I'm by no means a professional artist, but I've always disliked Minecraft's take on weapons that are always so close to the player. 

The models themselves are not incredibly detailed, but the textures are a bit more detailed, so this might be more fitting for 32x or 64x texture packs, but use them however you like! 

My goal is to create a couple more packs that will include tools as well as some mod support in this style.
